mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE AGG_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL_1H DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select:
SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
round(avgMerge(CPU_RATE_AVG),2) as avgCpuRate , maxMerge(CPU_RATE_MAX) as maxCpuRate, minMerge(CPU_RATE_MIN) as minCpuRate
round(avgMerge(MEMORY_AVG),2) as avgMemRate , maxMerge(MEMORY_MAX) as maxMemRate, minMerge(MEMORY_MIN) as minMemRate
round(avgMerge(CPU_READY_AVG),2) as avgCpuReadyTrend , maxMerge(CPU_READY_MAX) as maxCpuReadyTrend, minMerge(CPU_READY_MIN) as minCpuReadyTrend
round(avgMerge(CPU_USAGE_MHZ_AVG),2) as avgCpuUsageMhz , maxMerge(CPU_USAGE_MHZ_MAX) as maxCpuUsageMhz, minMerge(CPU_USAGE_MHZ_MIN) as minCpuUsageMhz
FROM AGG_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL_1H detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID = ${domainId}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

select b.uuid as uuid, a.TIME as time, a.CPU_RATE as cpuRate, a.MEMORY as memory from (select TIME,round(avgMerge(CPU_RATE_AVG),2) as CPU_RATE, round(avgMerge(MEMORY_AVG),2) as MEMORY,DOMAIN_ID from AGG_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL_1H WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND CLUSTER_ID = ${clusterId} GROUP BY TIME, DOMAIN_ID) as a join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_DOMAIN} as b on a.DOMAIN_ID=b.id order by uuid, time

SELECT round(avgMerge(CPU_RATE_AVG),2) as cpuRate, round(avgMerge(MEMORY_AVG),2) as memory, round(avgMerge(CPU_USAGE_MHZ_AVG),2) as cpuUsageMhz, round(avgMerge(CPU_READY_AVG),2) as cpuReady, TIME as time FROM AGG_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL_1H WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND DOMAIN_ID = ${domainId} GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC

select round(avgMerge(CPU_RATE_AVG),2) as avgCpuRate, round(avgMerge(MEMORY_AVG),2) as avgMemRate, maxMerge(CPU_RATE_MAX) as maxCpuRate, maxMerge(MEMORY_MAX) as maxMemRate FROM AGG_DOMAIN_CPU_DETAIL_1H WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND DOMAIN_ID = ${domainId} GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID
